prompt: Build a LowStockAlert component that reads inventory data and returns a count of items below 500g. I want to show a badge number in the sidebar when stock is low.

assertions.text: Uses 'sourdough_inventory' as the localStorage key (not 'bakeryos_inventory' — the tricky one since newer convention would suggest bakeryos_ prefix)
Uses InventoryItem type with the quantity field (not stock, amount, or other invented field name)
Compares quantity directly to 500 without unit conversion (quantity is already stored in grams per the type invariant)
